node.text:
Coming full circle.

The final piece of our life story, @abdul_sessay recognizes his value and gets a seat at the table amongst others who have learnt his same lessons. We are all students of life, constantly learning, evolving, and finding ways to better ourselves.

Continue watching through our 🔗 in bio.

A film by @mahaneela.jpg 
Creative direction by Steve McQueen

node.text:
The power of motivation. The strength of community.
 
@abdul_sessay finds solace with his running tribe as he experiences self-doubt, resiliency, and joy on his journey.
 
Wave three rolls in at 🔗 in bio.

🎥 @mahaneela.jpg 
🎨 Steve McQueen

node.text:
Go behind the design with Nike Materials Designer Francesca Capone-Jones (@franny_capone) and environmental journalist Sophia Li (@sophfei) as they break down the details discussing how two iconic Nike styles were reimagined with sustainability in mind.

Skip Around:
Catch up on Nike's Move to Zero initiative with Sophia Li and meet Nike Materials Designer, Francesca Capone-Jones (3:55), as she breaks down the innovation behind the all new Air Force 1 Crater and Waffle Racer Crater (10:50). Plus, get a crash course from a pro on the principles of sustainable design (30:45) before hearing Francesca answer questions from the audience (38:45). 

Shop AF1 Crater and Waffle Crater: 
http://smarturl.it/craterbts

node.title: Behind the Design: AF1 Crater and Waffle Crater

node.text:
Growing up in South Africa, @karabo_poppy was obsessed with art, but couldn’t find herself or her experiences reflected in it.
⠀
Karabo uses unconventional canvases like basketball courts and city streets—things people interact with in their everyday life. That’s why she is so drawn to the Air Force 1 for her artwork.
⠀
This season, Karabo’s artwork graces the Air Force 1 through Nike By You. #af1 #allfor1 #nikebyyou
